name: Crystalline Vault
approach: A reinforced descent into cold crystal chambers marked by seal-locks, archive ribs, and conduit warnings rather than civic ornament.
inside: Archive shelves, experimental enclosures, and guarded study chambers make the Vault feel more like a survival memory-engine than a library in comfort mode.
expected_behavior: do not improvise around conduit restrictions
economy_or_function: archive custody, experiment records, controlled copy circulation
